mainEntity.name: Which AI platforms are most important for Chicago law firm visibility?
mainEntity.text: Which AI platforms are most important for Chicago law firm visibility?

acceptedAnswer.text: Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, and ChatGPT; prioritize directories for all, as they dominate citations in Chicago queries.

suggestedAnswer.text: Perplexity favors depth, ChatGPT patterns, Google speed. Audit across platforms. Chicago's market demands national creds. Track with specialized tools. Visibility here influences national leads—beware multi-jurisdictional ethics.
